Research

Research Publications

Published Springer research in applied AI, fuzzy logic, renewable energy estimation, cybersecurity, cryptocurrency, and banking systems.

Springer2022

Solar Radiation and Solar Energy Estimation using ANN and Fuzzy Logic Concept

Environmental Science and Pollution Research — Springer

Research on estimating solar radiation and solar energy output using Artificial Neural Networks combined with Fuzzy Logic concepts for improved prediction accuracy

Read Paper
Springer2022

Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security in Cryptocurrency and Banking Systems

Annals of Data Science — Springer

Comprehensive study on the application of AI techniques in strengthening cybersecurity frameworks for cryptocurrency and banking platforms
